title: Open the app and navigate to the 'Ideas' tab
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on the 'ИДЕИ' (Ideas) tab at the bottom of the screen
expected_result: The screen should display a grid of nail design images

title: Navigate to the 'Favorites' tab
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on the 'ИЗБРАННОЕ' (Favorites) tab at the bottom of the screen
expected_result: The screen should display the user's favorite nail design ideas

title: Navigate to the 'Instructions' tab
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on the 'ИНСТРУКЦИИ' (Instructions) tab at the bottom of the screen
expected_result: The screen should display nail art instructions

title: Navigate to the 'Articles' tab
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on the 'СТАТЬИ' (Articles) tab at the bottom of the screen
expected_result: The screen should display nail art articles

title: Click on a nail design image
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on a nail design image in the grid
expected_result: The app should display a detailed view of the selected nail design

title: Click on the menu icon in the header
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on the menu icon in the header
expected_result: The app should display the menu options

title: Click on a navigation tab
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on a navigation tab (e.g., 'ИДЕИ', 'ИЗБРАННОЕ', 'ИНСТРУКЦИИ', 'СТАТЬИ')
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the selected tab

title: Click on a nail design image in the grid
test_steps: Open the Nail Art App | Tap on a nail design image in the grid
expected_result: The app should display a detailed view of the selected nail design
